main.name: Manish Kumar Das
main.bio: Hi there! I am Manish! I am an Applied Geology undergraduate student currently studying in the Indian Institute of Technology(IIT), Kharagpur. I am mostly interested in Physics, specially astronomy and cosmology. Other than Physics, I love spending my time programming and learning about computers and mathematics, playing badminton and playing guitar, though I have just started learning so its more of learning guitar than playing.

education.description: Trying my best to balance my courses and the extra stuff

work.title: Design Team Member
work.description: Designed posters, brochures and also about to start video editing.

testimonials.text: Manish is absolutely excellent to work with. The ideas and concepts he has are truly remarkable... It's always fun working with Manish. Would definitely reccomend him
Learning with Manish has been AWESOME, he makes learning anything so easy and approachable, you'll finally feel like you know what's going on!
